nation: Lac des Mille Lacs First Nation
one_time_description: Membership distributions recorded as other income (flood settlement related)
economic_notes: First Nation has interests in multiple limited partnerships and portfolio investments including Dallan Holdings LP, Dallan Fort William LP, Firesteel Construction, Giiwedin Environmental Services, Glow Transformers, Bolt Utilities, Stoneman Contracting, Kakina Economic Development Group, Wataynikaneyap LP, Sovereign Wealth, Bold Ventures Inc. Subsequent to year-end acquired a building for $2,400,000 and additional LP units in Dallan Holdings and Dallan Fort William for $875,000 total.
notes: Fiscal year ends March 31, 2023. Change in accounting policy effective April 1, 2022: investments in Government Business Enterprises changed from modified equity to cost method, applied retrospectively, prior year restated. Three entities consolidated: 1913563 Ontario Inc., Nezaadiikaang General Contracting GP Inc., Nezaadiikaang Economic Development LP. Large portfolio of minority-interest investments held at cost. Flood settlement member distributions of $840,000 in accounts payable at prior year reduced to $70,000 at current year. Non-compliance with First Nations Financial Transparency Act posting deadline noted. Transmission Line Phase II asset of $2,326,155 not yet in use with 0% amortization. Schedule of remuneration not included in extracted text.
